result: The data cleaning and preprocessing task was successfully completed. I loaded all 9 survey datasets, merged them using the `NSID` variable, and derived a consolidated `sex` variable. The consolidation logic prioritized the most recent valid response (from Wave 9 back to Wave 1) and then fell back to the most recent missing code. Missing values were harmonized according to the standard scheme (e.g., -9 for Refusal, -8 for Don't know, -3 for Not asked). The final output containing only `NSID` and the labelled `sex` variable was written to `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
